articles.title: Brothers get life-saving heart transplants 11 years apart in Delhi
articles.description: Two brothers underwent successful life-saving heart transplants 11 years apart after both were diagnosed with advanced Dilated Cardiomyopathy, a progressive heart condition. The rare case highlights a shared genetic risk in the family.

articles.description: The article discusses a viral story about a woman who quit two jobs due to abusive bosses, highlighting the alarming prevalence of workplace bullying in America and the effects it has on employees.

articles.title: Centre, Delhi govt launch major road projects for future-ready NCR
articles.description: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta announced a series of large-scale road projects jointly undertaken by the Centre and Delhi Government. The projects aim to ease traffic congestion and modernise the transport network in the Delhi-NCR region with new expressways.

articles.title: ‘US deserves mentally fit Prez’: ‘SLEEPY’ Trump faces backlash over dozing off during cabinet meet
articles.description: Donald Trump is facing massive backlash online after viral clips appeared to show him dozing off during a cabinet meeting, Memorial Day event, and White House appearances. Social media users revived the “Sleepy Joe” nickname once used against Joe Biden, with critics now mocking Trump as “Sleepy Donald” and “Slump Trump” amid growing scrutiny over his health and fitness. The controversy exploded after Trump seemingly nodded off while Marco Rubio discussed Iran, the Strait of Hormuz, and U.S. foreign policy during a high-stakes cabinet meeting.

articles.title: Jannik Sinner crashes out of Roland Garros, 30-match winning streak ends at hands of Juan Manuel Cerundolo
articles.description: An ailing Jannik Sinner fell in five sets to Argentinian Juan Manuel Cerundolo; the men's number one seed knocked out despite serving for the match.

articles.title: PM Modi congratulates new Slovenian PM Janez Jansa, eyes stronger ties
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi congratulated Janez Jansa on his election as Slovenia's new PM, looking forward to strengthening bilateral ties. Slovenia's parliament voted to bring back the right-wing leader, ending a post-election deadlock.

articles.title: VPL: Defending title brings unnecessary load, says Jitesh Sharma
articles.description: 'Defending the title gives extra unnecessary load,' says NECO Master Blaster captain Jitesh Sharma ahead of VPL. He contrasts the mindset of defending with chasing, urging his players to be fearless and focus on improving as cricketers.

articles.title: Gujarat: Modern nursery farming boosts chilli yields for Rajkot farmers
articles.description: Farmers in Gujarat's Rajkot are shifting to scientific nursery farming for chilli cultivation. This modern approach, supported by government subsidies for nurseries and irrigation, is boosting crop yields, reducing losses, and improving farmer incomes.

articles.title: Keanu Reeves supports 'White Horse' director Carl Rinsch before sentencing: 'In my opinion, Carl is an exceptional artist'
articles.description: Hollywood star Keanu Reeves has appealed to a federal judge for leniency for filmmaker Carl Rinsch, convicted in an $11 million Netflix fraud case. Rinsch, who directed Reeves in '47 Ronin', faces sentencing for allegedly misusing funds meant for the unfinished sci-fi series 'White Horse'. Reeves described Rinsch as a visionary artist and a friend.

articles.title: Iran backs Oman after Trump threatens to ‘blow them up’ over Hormuz dispute: Why Muskat finds itself at the centre of crisis

articles.title: Nithin Kamath is worried about Indian farmers; Zerodha CEO explains how Strait of Hormuz closure could seriously hurt everyone
articles.description: Zerodha CEO Nithin Kamath has warned about India’s heavy reliance on imported fertilisers and raw materials used in fertiliser production, calling it a major vulnerability for the country’s agriculture sector. Amid global supply chain disruptions and rising energy prices, Kamath stressed the urgent need to reduce this dependency. He also highlighted the importance of innovation, sustainable farming practices and investment in alternatives such as bio-inputs, organic manure, green hydrogen and biogas to help India move towards greater agricultural self-sufficiency.

articles.title: Dharmendra Pradhan chairs review meeting on CBSE Class 12 evaluation, post-result process
articles.description: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan met with CBSE officials to review Class 12 evaluation and post-result processes. The meeting addressed concerns regarding the On Screen Marking System. Discussions focused on improving the re-evaluation portal and digital platforms. Plans were outlined for enhanced student support and transparent service delivery. Measures for student benefit were highlighted.

articles.title: Former BP chair Albert Manifold denies wrongdoing after ouster
articles.description: Albert Manifold, the former BP Chair, has denied misconduct following his dismissal. He acknowledged pushing for changes in costs and efficiency. Manifold stated that he does not accept lies being told about him. He also described the current BP leadership as having integrity. Manifold has reportedly hired a law firm after his removal from the position.

It fosters advancements in materials science, AI, and manufacturing, creating vital spillovers for civilian sectors like automotive and renewable energy. This initiative strengthens India's technological ecosystem and workforce, positioning it as a global aerospace supplier.

articles.title: Madhya Pradesh CM Mohan Yadav Launches UCC Suggestion Portal, Seeks Public Feedback Till June 15
articles.description: Madhya Pradesh has taken a major step towards implementing the Uniform Civil Code (UCC). Chief Minister Dr. Mohan Yadav launched the official consultation portal ucc.mp.gov.in and invited citizens, political parties and social organisations to share suggestions on the proposed law.The state government has set June 15 as the deadline for public feedback. Earlier, the government had formed a six-member committee headed by retired Supreme Court judge Justice Ranjana Prakash Desai to examine the feasibility of implementing the UCC in Madhya Pradesh.If implemented, Madhya Pradesh could become the fifth state in India to adopt the Uniform Civil Code.

articles.title: Salman Khan: सलमान खानकडून फॅन्सना खास गिफ्ट; आगामी सिनेमाचं हृदयस्पर्शी गाणं रिलीज, VIDEOपाहून चाहते भारावले
articles.description:
Salman Khan Matrubhoomi Main Hoon Song: भाईजान (Bhaijaan) सलमान खान (Salman Khan) सध्या आपल्या आगामी सिनेमामुळे चर्चेत आहे. 'मातृभूमी' (Matrubhoomi) या सिनेमाच्या रिलीजची प्रेक्षक आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहेत. काही कारणास्तव या सिनेमाच्या (Entertainment) प्रदर्शनाची तारीख पुढे ढकलण्यात आली आहे. दरम्यान, सलमानचे फॅन्स आणि प्रेक्षकवर्ग 'मातृभूमी' या सिनेमाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहेत. दरम्यान, 'मातृभूमी' या सिनेमाचं नवीन गाणं नुकतेच रिलीज झाले आहे. ईदच्या खास प्रसंगी 'मातृभूमी' या सिनेमाचं 'मैं हूं' हे गाणं प्रदर्शित झालं आहे. गुरुवारी सकाळी सलमान खानने आपल्या सोशल मीडिया अकाऊंटवर आपल्या आगामी सिनेमाच्या गाण्याचा व्हिडीओ शेअर केला आहे. या गाण्याला प्रेक्षकांकडून उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद मिळत आहे.

सोशल मीडियावर शेअर केलेल्या व्हिडीओत सलमान खानसोबत चित्रांगदा सिंह दिसत आहे. हे गाणे पार्टी साँग किंवा रोमँटिक नसून, एक अत्यंत दु:खद आणि भावनिक गाणं आहे. मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, या गाण्यात काही बदल केले जात आहे. सलमान खानने या सिनेमातील गाण्याचा टीझर रिलीज केला आहे. गाण्याचा टीझर शेअर करत त्यानं लक्षवेधी कॅप्शन दिलं आहे.

सलमान खाननं शेअर केलं आगामी सिनेमाचं गाणं, इमोशनल व्हिडीओ पाहून चाहते भावुक (Salman Khan emotional song on EID)

View this post on Instagram

A post shared by Salman Khan (@beingsalmankhan)

सलमान खानने व्हिडीओ शेअर करत कॅप्शनमध्ये, 'O o o o om 🕉️ o o o oomm🕉️
O o ommm🕉️ O omm🕉️
Main hooon' असं लिहिलं आहे. हा म्यूझिक व्हिडीओ समोर येताच सलमान खानच्या फॅन्सना प्रचंड आनंद झाला आहे. या गाण्याला प्रेक्षकांकडून पसंती मिळत आहे. बऱ्याच लोकांनी कमेंट सेक्शनमध्ये 'ईद मुबारक भाईजान' असं म्हणत शुभेच्छा दिल्या आहेत. एकानं कमेंटमध्ये, 'ईद मुबारक, मी तुमच्याच पोस्टची वाट पाहत होतो', असं म्हटलं आहे.

हे नवीन गाणं सलमान खान आणि चित्रांगदा या दोघांवर केंद्रीत आहे. या गाण्यात प्रेम आणि जोडीदारापासून दूर राहण्याची तळमळ देखील आहे. या दोन्ही भावना या गाण्यातून स्पष्ट दिसतात. हा व्हिडीओ पूर्णपणे ब्लॅक अँड व्हाईट आहे. 'मैं हूं' या गाण्याच्या ओरिजनल वर्जनमध्ये एका सैनिकाच्या परिवाराचा प्रवास दाखवण्यात आला आहे. या गाण्यात आनंदाचे क्षण आणि जोडीदारापासून दूर जाण्याचे दु:ख देखील दाखवण्यात आलंय. हे गाणं श्रेया घोषाल आणि अयानलाल यांनी गायले असून, हे गाणं आपल्या शूर सैनिकांनी केलेल्या त्यागाचे चित्रण करते.

महत्त्वाच्या इतर बातम्या:

'देऊळ बंद 2' सिनेमातील 'तो' ट्विस्ट पाहण्यासाठी प्रेक्षकांची सिनेमागृहात गर्दी; 7 दिवसांत कमावले 'इतके' कोटी

articles.title: BREAKING NEWS: Tension Erupts at Kalyan’s Durgadi Fort During Bakrid Prayers in Maharashtra
articles.description: A major controversy unfolded in Maharashtra’s Kalyan area during Bakrid celebrations after tensions flared at the historic Durgadi Fort, where members of Hindu organisations and Shiv Sena workers gathered during ongoing prayers. The situation led to heavy sloganeering and heightened security concerns as police closely monitored the sensitive location to prevent escalation. According to reports, the dispute is linked to a long-standing religious and legal conflict surrounding the Durgadi Fort premises in Thane district near Mumbai. The site has remained controversial for decades, with both Hindu and Muslim communities claiming historical and religious rights over the land. While one side considers the location associated with a temple dedicated to Goddess Durga, the other claims the presence of a mazar and links the site to Waqf property rights. During Bakrid prayers on Friday, groups associated with Hindu organisations reportedly assembled near the fort and conducted Hanuman Chalisa recitations, while raising slogans and reiterating their claim over the disputed site. Shiv Sena supporters carrying party symbols were also seen participating in the demonstrations. Local authorities deployed security personnel in the area as crowds gathered from both communities. Officials are said to be maintaining close surveillance to avoid any communal disturbance in the region. The dispute surrounding Durgadi Fort has a long political and social history dating back several decades. Political observers note that the issue has repeatedly resurfaced during religious occasions and festivals, often leading to heightened tensions and protests. The matter remains under judicial consideration, with court proceedings still pending regarding ownership and rights over the disputed premises. Meanwhile, authorities continue to appeal for peace and restraint as the sensitive issue once again draws attention across Maharashtra.
